news.Title: Short Sellers Keep Placing Their Bets Against Micron Stock. Why They Think MU Will Stumble Soon.
news.Content: For much of the artificial-intelligence (AI)-driven semiconductor rally, Micron Technology (MU) has been one of Wall Street’s hottest trades, fueled by explosive demand for high-bandwidth memory chips and tightening DRAM supply. But while bullish investors continue to chase the AI narrative, short sellers are quietly building a sizable bet that the rally may be nearing exhaustion. Short interest in Micron has climbed to roughly 37.3 million shares, near the highest levels seen in years, after rising steadily through 2026. This represents 3.32% of the public float. The latest data shows bearish ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Short interest in Micron Technology has increased significantly, reaching 3.32% of the public float, indicating growing bearish sentiment.
• Despite strong gains driven by AI demand for high-bandwidth memory (HBM) chips, short sellers are betting on the rally's exhaustion.
• Concerns include aggressive expectations, valuation, cyclical memory pricing risks, and potential oversupply as capital spending increases.
• Micron reported fiscal Q2 2026 revenue of $23.9 billion, a 196.4% YoY increase, driven by HBM and DRAM demand.
• The stock is up 168.3% year-to-date and 707.4% over the past 12 months, trading at a forward P/E of 12.66.

news.Title: The Microsoft Disaster: Why Dropping the OpenAI Leash Flips the Entire Script for MSFT Stock
news.Content: For a long while now, the Wall Street crowd has been totally hypnotized by this wild AI rally. Running the table, Microsoft (MSFT) was crowned the undisputed heavyweight champion of this race. Early 2026 investor logic? Simple and rock-solid: They practically bought out the planet's top AI asset, OpenAI, building this flawless tag-team supposed to shred the competition to pieces. Slapping a leadership premium on their stock price is exactly what the market did. Right now, though, we're staring down a massive tectonic quake totally wrecking that whole ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft's exclusive partnership with OpenAI has ended due to a new contract allowing other firms access to OpenAI's technology.
• This loss of exclusivity is seen as a strategic setback for Microsoft, potentially hindering its ability to innovate at the speed of thought.
• Rivals like Amazon are gaining similar access to OpenAI's tech, leveling the playing field and diminishing Microsoft's unique selling proposition.
• Microsoft faces a double financial burden of investing in data centers for third-party models and developing its own backup models.
• The narrative of Microsoft as the undisputed AI heavyweight is challenged, potentially impacting its stock valuation.
news.Keywords: OpenAI, strategic partnership, exclusivity, competitive landscape, AI development

news.Title: GDP Alert: The United Kingdom Is Poorer Than Every Individual U.S. State
news.Content: For centuries, the United Kingdom has sculpted a reputation for being one of the world’s richest and most powerful countries — and it still is. Today, the U.K. is home to some of the globe's top financial institutions, major multinationals, and elite universities. London is one of the most influential cities on the planet, and its political machines command a lot of respect overseas. But if you really crunch the numbers, the U.K.’s finances aren’t quite as ironclad as you might think. According to new analysis from the Institute of Economic Affairs (IEA), the average Briton is “significantly poorer than ...
news.AI_Summary:
• A report indicates the UK's GDP per capita ($57,000) ranks 21st globally, making it poorer than every individual US state on a per-person basis.
• States like New York ($120,000+ GDP per capita) and Massachusetts/Washington ($110,000+ GDP per capita) have significantly higher GDP per capita.
• Even Mississippi, traditionally the poorest US state, ranks higher than the UK in GDP per capita based on certain datasets.
• The economic gap between the US and UK has widened since the 2008 financial crisis due to differences in productivity, investment, labor markets, and energy costs.
• Big Tech's growth is cited as a primary factor in the US pulling ahead economically.
news.Keywords: GDP per capita, economic comparison, UK vs US, productivity growth, Big Tech

news.Title: We’re Not in a Bubble. Wall Street Just Hasn’t Caught Up With the New ‘Physics’ of the Stock Market.
news.Content: Modern financial markets are triggering cognitive dissonance among investors. On the one hand, we're seeing historical highs among stock indices. On the other hand, there are obvious signs of macroeconomic fatigue. As I detailed recently, looking at the valuation of inflation (through the prism of the Big Mac Index), the real U.S. economy, measured in physical base goods, has actually been in a hidden recession for the last 20 years. The stock market, however, has managed to more than double over this time. More News from Barchart Microsoft vs. Apple Stock: The Numbers Reveal a Clear Winner Heading Into H2 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The article argues that modern financial markets are not in a bubble but represent a fundamental shift in economic structure, moving from industrial to digital.
• Traditional valuation metrics like the Buffett Indicator (228%) and Big Mac Index are misaligned with the digital economy's realities.
• The stock market's capitalization is increasingly driven by future earnings potential, particularly from companies with zero marginal costs in software and digital services.
• Companies like Microsoft and Alphabet exhibit significantly higher net profit margins (exceeding 25-40%) compared to traditional industrial companies (around 10%).
• The decoupling of stock indices from macroeconomic indicators like GDP is attributed to the revolution in profitability enabled by digital technologies.
news.Keywords: market valuation, economic shift, digital economy, zero marginal cost, profitability

news.Title: Boom or Bubble? This Is Where Micron Technology Stock Could Be in 5 Years
news.Content: The memory industry has been booming for the past three years, propelled by the proliferation of artificial intelligence (AI), which has created demand for larger, faster memory across multiple applications. Micron Technology (NASDAQ: MU) has been a major beneficiary of the memory boom. Micron stock has shot up by 935% over the past three years, driven by a big jump in its revenue and earnings. Investors, however, may now be wondering if the memory specialist has now entered bubble territory, especially considering that it has been historically susceptible ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Micron Technology (MU) has benefited significantly from the AI-driven memory boom, with its stock up 935% over three years.
• The demand for larger, faster memory for AI workloads in data centers, particularly High-Bandwidth Memory (HBM), is driving the current cycle.
• HBM revenue is projected to reach $55 billion in 2026 and $130 billion by 2030, with data centers consuming 70% of memory supply.
• Memory manufacturers are prioritizing HBM over DRAM, leading to potential shortages until 2030 due to long fabrication plant lead times.
• Micron returned to revenue growth and profitability in 2024, with a favorable pricing environment expected to sustain its growth.

news.Title: AMD Expands Taiwan Capacity as AI Tightens CPU Supply
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Advanced Micro Devices ( AMD , Financials ) is moving to expand production capacity in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is expanding its production capacity in Taiwan to meet higher-than-expected CPU demand, indicating AI growth beyond GPUs.
• CEO Lisa Su stated that the global CPU market is tight, with AMD working with partners to increase supply throughout 2024 and significantly more capacity planned for 2027.
• Demand is driven by AI inferencing and agentic AI, increasing the need for CPUs in data centers and enterprise systems.
• AMD plans to invest over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, focusing on advanced packaging, substrates, and rack-scale AI systems.
• The company is also ramping up production of its Venice CPUs using TSMC's 2-nanometer process technology.
news.Keywords: CPU supply, AI inferencing, data center demand, Taiwan manufacturing, advanced packaging

news.Title: 搶台積電大客戶？三星李在鎔訪台密會聯發科 出狠招拉攏
news.Content: 三星靠著記憶體狂潮扭轉半導體部門的營運困境，如今又想藉此拉抬連年虧損的晶圓代工業務，傳出三星會長李在鎔與多位高層低調訪台，行程 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星會長李在鎔低調訪台，傳聞將拜訪聯發科執行長蔡力行，試圖藉由記憶體產能優勢，拉攏聯發科支持其晶圓代工業務，作為第二供應來源。
• 業界認為，超微與特斯拉願意下單三星，是考量其記憶體產能，能確保HBM與DRAM的供應；聯發科取得Google TPU訂單後，也配合Google策略下單英特爾先進封裝，讓三星感到有機可趁。
• 三星欲藉此推進晶圓代工業務，但關鍵仍在於良率與規模能否符合客戶期待，目前台積電在此方面仍具顯著優勢。
• 英特爾積極推銷先進製程與封裝技術，可能爭取到輝達等重要客戶，與台積電形成競爭；三星則利用記憶體優勢打包晶圓代工，市場競爭激烈。
news.Keywords: 晶圓代工,記憶體,先進製程,市場競爭,供應鏈策略

news.Title: TSMC Trails 140% AI Rallies As Investors Broaden Chip Bets
news.Content: This article first appeared on GuruFocus . Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. ( NYSE:TSM ) is still one of Asia's most important AI beneficiaries , but investors are no longer treating it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Investors are broadening their chip investments beyond TSMC (Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.) as AI demand spreads across various hardware segments.
• TSMC shares are up 46% year-to-date, but MediaTek and Samsung Electronics have seen rallies exceeding 140%.
• MediaTek is gaining traction for its work on application-specific integrated circuits (ASICs) with Alphabet.
• Samsung is benefiting from its position as the world's largest memory maker and has joined the $1 trillion market cap club.
• Fund managers are diversifying due to single-stock limits and TSMC's significant weighting in the Taiwan index, looking at other Asian tech names.
news.Keywords: Chip sector diversification, AI hardware, ASIC development, memory market, investment strategy

news.Title: SpaceX IPO: Why It Could Burst the AI Bubble
news.Content: Talk of an AI bubble has faded since late last year, when signs of weakness in some AI stocks and fears around circular deals triggered a sell-off in names like Nvidia . Since then, a shortage in memory chips and strong demand growth have sent AI stocks surging again, with major indexes hitting all-time highs following the dip over the Iran war. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SpaceX's IPO filing reveals a potential AI bubble test, with a $2 trillion valuation target.
• SpaceX reported Q1 revenue growth of 15.4% to $4.7 billion and a GAAP operating loss of $1.9 billion.
• The company's 2025 revenue was $18.7 billion, with an operating loss of $2.6 billion.
• A $2 trillion valuation for SpaceX implies a price-to-sales ratio over 100, significantly higher than most S&P 500 stocks.
• The IPO could either fuel an AI stock frenzy or trigger a sell-off if the valuation proves unsustainable.
news.Keywords: AI bubble, IPO valuation, SpaceX financials, semiconductor cycle, market sentiment

news.Title: Wall Street's Favorite New AI Stock vs. the One They're Ignoring: The Numbers Aren't Even Close
news.Content: One of Wall Street's favorite artificial intelligence (AI) stocks right now is, no surprise, the semiconductor company Cerebras (NASDAQ: CBRS) . It's been a publicly traded company for only about a week, but enthusiasm is high. Investors rushing in to buy the stock have pushed it up by about 60% from its $185 IPO price as of this writing. But not all AI stocks are feeling the love right now, especially not Microsoft (NASDAQ: MSFT) . Despite solid growth in ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Microsoft reported fiscal Q3 2026 sales of nearly $83 billion, an 18% year-over-year increase, with non-GAAP earnings up 21% to $4.27 per share.
• In contrast, Cerebras reported 2025 sales of only $500 million and a non-GAAP loss of almost $76 million.
• Microsoft's stock has declined over 8% in the past 12 months, while Cerebras' stock has surged about 60% from its IPO price.
• The article contrasts the financial performance of Microsoft and Cerebras, suggesting investors may be overlooking Microsoft's strong fundamentals in favor of the newer AI stock.
news.Keywords: AI, Cloud Computing, Semiconductor, Financial Performance, Valuation

news.Title: OpenAI Is Going Public But Is It for the Wrong Reasons?
news.Content: The AI sector is about to get even bigger. According to several media reports, OpenAI , the ChatGPT creator is aiming to file confidentially for an IPO in the coming weeks with the goal of going public as soon as September. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue » The news comes as another blockbuster IPO, SpaceX, is headed for the public ...
news.AI_Summary:
• OpenAI is reportedly planning a confidential IPO in the coming weeks, aiming to go public as soon as September.
• Anthropic, a competitor, is in talks to raise funding at a valuation between $900 billion and $950 billion, potentially surpassing OpenAI's last valuation of $852 billion.
• Anthropic's revenue is expected to more than double from $4.8 billion in Q1 to $10.9 billion in Q2, while OpenAI reached annualized revenue of $25 billion in March, up 17% year-to-date.
• OpenAI is facing a significant cash crunch, with substantial future spending commitments and projected cash flow losses until 2030, suggesting the IPO may be driven by necessity rather than strength.
news.Keywords: IPO, AI, Valuation, Cash Burn, Competition

news.Title: Investors Look Beyond TSMC as AI Boom Spreads to New Winners
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- After several years flying high as Asia’s best Nvidia Corp. proxy, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. is increasingly vying with other artificial intelligence stocks for investor attention. Most Read from Bloomberg Bungie Plans Layoffs After Ending ‘Destiny 2’ Development Spot the Difference: Putin Gets Trump Treatment From Xi in China Iran Says the US’s Latest Proposal Has ‘Narrowed the Gaps’ Iran in Talks With Oman Over Permanent Hormuz Toll System Modi’s Toffee Gift to Meloni Ignites Rally in Wrong Indian Stock Stock traders are chasing a wider array of beneficiaries ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. (TSMC) is facing increased competition for investor attention from other AI beneficiaries.
• While TSMC shares are up 46% this year, MediaTek and Samsung Electronics have seen gains exceeding 140%.
• TSMC's underperformance is attributed to a diversification trend away from the company as AI adoption broadens.
• The rise of agentic AI is driving demand for a wider range of chips, including CPUs, benefiting companies like MediaTek and Samsung.
• Investment caps and the desire for diversification are pushing funds to explore alternatives beyond TSMC, impacting its relative performance.
news.Keywords: AI beneficiaries, diversification, semiconductor market, chip designers, market performance

news.Title: Analysis-ECB, banks rift hampers Europe's efforts to loosen reliance on US payments giants
news.Content: By Jesús Aguado and Valentina Za MADRID/MILAN, May 22 (Reuters) - Europe's push to curb its dependence on U.S. payments giants Visa and Mastercard has driven a wedge between the European Central Bank and financial firms keen to shield revenues, hobbling efforts to build a home-grown system, several people involved said. More from Yahoo Scout How are European banks resisting the digital euro? What is Europe's digital euro initiative and timeline? What revenue impact would digital euro have? Why is Europe seeking payment system sovereignty? A ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Europe's efforts to reduce reliance on U.S. payment giants like Visa and Mastercard are being hampered by disagreements between the European Central Bank (ECB) and financial firms.
• The ECB plans to introduce a digital euro by 2029, but European banks are concerned about potential customer fund transfers to an ECB-guaranteed wallet and are exploring alternative solutions.
• A proposed cap on merchant fees for digital euro transactions could cost the private payments system an estimated 8 billion to 9 billion euros in lost annual revenues.
• The development of a home-grown European payment system faces challenges due to misaligned incentives and timelines between public and private actors, potentially impacting revenue streams for financial institutions.
news.Keywords: Payment Systems, Digital Euro, Regulatory Hurdles, Merchant Fees, Financial Sovereignty

news.Title: 英特爾晶圓代工業務有進展、打算用這招和台積電競爭　一文掌握陳立武受訪3重點
news.Content:
作者：財訊雙週刊／林信男、財訊新聞中心

上任逾1年的英特爾執行長陳立武，似乎正帶領這家一度搖搖欲墜的企業，逐漸走出泥淖。美東時間5月18日，陳立武接受美國財經媒體CNBC的Mad Money節目專訪，分享英特爾在業務上的 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 英特爾執行長陳立武表示，其18A製程良率已顯著改善，每月提升7%-8%，晶圓代工業務成長16%達54億美元。
• 英特爾預計在2026年下半年獲得客戶的晶圓代工訂單承諾，並將以14A製程與台積電競爭。
• 英特爾第一季資料中心營收年增22%達51億美元，顯示其在AI領域取得進展，CPU需求因AI運算增加而復甦。
news.Keywords: 晶圓代工,製程技術,AI晶片,CPU,競爭策略

news.Content:
作者：財訊雙週刊／林信男、財訊新聞中心

上任逾1年的英特爾執行長陳立武，似乎正帶領這家一度搖搖欲墜的企業，逐漸走出泥淖。美東時間5月18日，陳立武接受美國財經媒體CNBC的Mad Money節目專訪，分享英特爾在業務上的 ...

• 英特爾執行長陳立武帶領公司走出困境，第一季資料中心營收年增22%至51億美元，顯示AI領域取得進展。
• CPU因AI運作需求增加而重拾重要性，摩根士丹利報告指出CPU扮演「AI系統管理階層」角色。
• 英特爾晶圓代工業務進展優於預期，18A製程良率每月提升7-8%，第一季營收成長16%至54億美元。
• 預計2026年下半年可望取得多家客戶的晶圓代工訂單，並將與台積電在14A製程上展開競爭。
• 英特爾計劃在未來5至10年內轉變為一家截然不同的公司，成為「新英特爾」。
news.Keywords: 英特爾,CPU,AI,晶圓代工,製程技術

• This announcement follows the U.S. administration's plan to invest $2 billion in quantum computing companies.
• Quantum computing is gaining investor interest due to its potential applications in drug discovery, financial modeling, and cryptography.

news.Title: French quantum firm Alice & Bob wins new investment from Nvidia venture arm
news.Content: By Dominique Patton PARIS, May 22 (Reuters) - French company Alice & Bob has won funding from Nvidia 's venture capital arm NVentures, it said on ‌Friday, supporting its development of hardware to make quantum computing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• French quantum computing firm Alice & Bob has received funding from Nvidia's venture capital arm, NVentures.
• The investment supports Alice & Bob's development of hardware to improve the error-proneness of quantum computers, focusing on 'cat qubits'.
• Investor interest in quantum computing is surging due to potential applications in drug discovery, financial modeling, and cryptography.

news.Keywords: Quantum Computing, Venture Capital, Hardware Development, Semiconductor, Strategic Partnership

news.Title: No, Tesla Doesn't Need E.U. Approval to Sell Full Self-Driving (Supervised) in Europe
news.Content: Obtaining approval to sell its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software in Europe is one of the key catalysts for Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) stock in 2026. Not only are FSD (Supervised) and other software services becoming an important revenue generator for the company, but the demonstration of FSD (Supervised) is a key precursor of the potential approval of robotaxis using unsupervised FSD in the future. And the good news is that Tesla doesn't need European Union-wide approval to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla does not require a single EU-wide approval to sell its Full Self-Driving (Supervised) software in Europe; it can pursue country-by-country approvals.
• The Netherlands has already approved Tesla's FSD (Supervised) via its Vehicle Authority (RDW), setting a precedent for other countries.
• An EU-wide vote on FSD (Supervised) approval is anticipated in July, but individual countries can grant provisional approvals based on existing data, potentially speeding up market entry.
• The approval of FSD (Supervised) is considered a key catalyst for Tesla's stock, paving the way for potential robotaxi approvals in the future.
news.Keywords: Autonomous Driving, Regulatory Approval, Market Entry, Software Services, Catalysts

news.Content:

news.Title: 蘇姿丰：搞科技須看得比浪潮更遠，台積電與Chiplet技術是AMD逆轉勝關鍵
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】蘇姿丰在2014年剛接任AMD執行長後，歷經長達五年的冷言冷語，她提到，但還是認為會成功，因為自己的信念是，搞科技必須看得比浪潮更遠（See ah ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD執行長蘇姿丰強調，科技發展需「看得比浪潮更遠」，並成功押注台積電(TSMC)作為其主要晶圓代工夥伴。
• 她同時力推小晶片(Chiplet)技術與先進封裝，認為這是克服摩爾定律放緩的關鍵，並已應用於AMD最新的AI旗艦晶片MI450。
• 蘇姿丰指出，半導體未來的戰場已從單一晶片轉向系統整合，包含晶片、封裝、網路及光學技術等。
news.Keywords: Chiplet,先進封裝,台積電,AI晶片,系統整合

news.Title: ������������������������������������������������������������Chiplet���������AMD���������������
news.Content: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】蘇姿丰在2014年剛接任AMD執行長後，歷經長達五年的冷言冷語，她提到，但還是認為會成功，因為自己的信念是，搞科技必須看得比浪潮更遠（See ah ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD執行長蘇姿丰表示，成功關鍵在於「看得比浪潮更遠」，並成功押注台積電與小晶片(Chiplet)技術。
• 她認為摩爾定律放慢，將電晶體做得更小遇到物理極限，Chiplet技術將功能拆分再透過先進封裝整合，成為主流。
• AMD最新AI旗艦晶片MI450即是Chiplet技術的成果。
• 先進封裝與Chiplet技術已成為產業主流，是全球產業生態系共同創造的工程奇蹟。
• 半導體的下一個戰場已從「單一晶片」升級為晶片、封裝、網路與光學技術高度整合的「系統」爭霸戰。
news.Keywords: AMD,執行長,台積電,Chiplet,先進封裝

news.Title: 台股漲勢趨緩？   他憂「暴跌前兆」想轉高股息     網酸：跌一點就在慌
news.Content:
[ FTNN新聞網 ]實習記者陳予芊／綜合報導

台股近期高檔震盪，不少投資人也開始重新檢視自己的投資策略。近日，有網友發文表示，隨著市場漲勢趨緩，加上通膨、國債 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 有網友擔心台股漲勢趨緩，加上通膨、國債利率等問題，考慮轉進高股息ETF以求穩健獲利。
• 部分網友認為目前僅是正常震盪，不應因小幅回跌而恐慌，並質疑頻繁轉換策略的有效性。
• 網友指出，高股息ETF配息可能變動，下跌時為維持配息可能變賣虧損資產，影響本金回升。
• 批評者認為，投資策略反覆切換，缺乏中心思想，最終可能兩頭空。
• 提醒投資人應獨立判斷，審慎評估並自負投資風險。
news.Keywords: 台股,高股息ETF,投資策略,市場震盪,資產配置

news.Title: 台積電美元股利設防套利，央行擬限外資一年僅能切換一次幣別
news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】路透報導，台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利後，市場傳出台灣央行計畫針對台積電(2330)等企業未來發放美元股利建立 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣央行擬限制外資領取台積電美元股利時，每年僅能切換一次幣別，以防堵套利行為並減緩新台幣匯率波動。
• 此舉旨在降低台積電外資股東的換匯成本，同時避免大型資金頻繁進出新台幣匯市。
• 預計最快於2027年啟動外幣股利發放，此制度有望增加台積電對長線外資的吸引力。
news.Keywords: 美元股利,外資,匯率控管,換匯成本,新台幣

news.Content: 【財訊快報／陳孟朔】路透報導，台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利後，市場傳出台灣央行計畫針對台積電(2330)等企業未來發放美元股利建立 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台灣主管機關推動上市櫃公司對外資發放外幣現金股利，央行擬建立換匯控管機制，限制外國投資人每年僅能變更一次領取幣別。
• 此舉旨在降低台積電等企業外資股東的換匯成本，並防堵大型資金頻繁進出新台幣匯市，減緩匯市波動。
• 若實施美元股利，企業與外資可減少匯兌成本與匯損風險，台積電因外資持股高且營收以美元計價，為指標性企業。
• 過去台積電採季度配息，外資換匯可能放大新台幣季節性資金流動，美元股利有望紓緩此壓力。
• 預計最快於2027年啟動外幣股利發放，一年僅能變更一次幣別的限制將使台積電對長線外資更具吸引力。
news.Keywords: 台積電,外幣股利,換匯控管,新台幣匯市,外資

news.Title: 蘇姿丰讚台灣擁完整供應鏈，強調海外生產同樣重要
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-22 11:15:16 黃立安 發佈

AMD董事長暨執行長蘇姿丰(附圖)今(22)日出席天下雜誌論壇時表示，AMD目標是在高效能運算(HPC)與AI運算領域取得領導地位，這背後關鍵 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD執行長蘇姿丰表示，AMD目標是在高效能運算(HPC)與AI運算領域取得領導地位，並持續深化與台灣供應鏈合作。
• 她指出，台灣擁有全球唯一完整的半導體生態系，並讚許台灣供應鏈積極往海外擴產是正確方向。
• AMD將採用台積電(2330)2奈米製程技術，並與台灣供應鏈共同投資超過100億美元擴充先進封裝、載板等產能。
• 蘇姿丰認為，台灣半導體生態系能高度整合與密切合作是獨特優勢，同時全球化分散製造能力同樣重要。
news.Keywords: AI運算,HPC,供應鏈合作,先進製程,產能擴充

news.Content: 超微 (AMD-US) 執行長蘇姿丰 (Lisa Su) 今 (22) 日參與論壇，會中表示，半導體與 AI 市場正處於前所未有的高速成長期，AMD 也持續深化與台灣供應鏈合作，並與台灣生態系夥伴共同投資先進封裝、載板、測試產能與機櫃級整合等領域 ...

• 她認為台灣企業即使是競爭對手也能友善合作，是共同成長的獨特文化，並反駁AI泡沫論，認為產業處於發展初期。

news.Title: AMD ramping up Taiwan capacity as global CPU market tightens
news.Content: By Wen-Yee Lee and Ben Blanchard TAIPEI, May 22 (Reuters) - Advanced Micro Devices is working with Taiwan partners to ramp up production capacity as stronger-than-expected demand squeezes the global CPU market, CEO Lisa Su said on Friday. Speaking in ‌Taipei after a visit to China, Su said she had met AMD's largest customers in China and globally ...
news.AI_Summary:
• AMD is increasing its production capacity in Taiwan with local partners due to higher-than-expected global CPU demand.
• CEO Lisa Su stated the CPU market is currently 'tight' and expects supply to increase quarterly throughout 2024, with significant expansion planned for 2027 and beyond.
• Growth drivers include AI inferencing and agentic AI, broadening demand for CPUs beyond traditional GPU applications.
• AMD plans to invest over $10 billion in Taiwan's AI sector, focusing on advanced packaging, substrates, and manufacturing for rack-scale systems, and is ramping production of Venice CPUs using TSMC's 2-nanometer process.
news.Keywords: CPU Market, Supply Chain, AI Demand, Manufacturing Capacity, Strategic Investment

• This action is driven by strong demand for AI-related products.
• AMD is a significant customer of TSMC, the world's largest contract chipmaker.
• The company is seeking to increase its manufacturing output to meet market needs.
news.Keywords: Production Ramp, AI Demand, Supply Chain, Contract Manufacturing, Capacity Expansion

news.Content: 南韓三星電子的勞資談判取得初步共識，工會暫停大罷工的決定，後續待工會成員投票確認是否接受談判結果，罷工危機未完全解除。南韓媒體披露雙方談 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南韓三星電子的勞資談判取得初步共識，工會暫停大罷工，但罷工危機未完全解除。
• 南韓媒體報導，工會以台積電發放2061億元獎金、人均264萬元為例，向三星資方爭取更高獎金。
• 台積電的獎金發放方式是每年由董事會綜合考量業績、現金流、投資計畫、股東回報等因素決定，並無固定發放比例。
• 三星則在新設半導體部門特別績效獎金，以部門獲利10.5%為財源，觸發條件為未來幾年獲利達標。
• 南韓商界擔心三星模式引發骨牌效應，要求比照標準的聲浪湧現，恐蔓延至其他核心產業。
news.Keywords: 勞資談判,獎金發放,績效獎金,成本結構,產業蔓延

news.Title: Nvidia Just Raised Its Dividend By 2,400% -- and That Wasn't Even the Biggest News From Its Earnings Report
news.Content: AI chipmaker Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) managed to largely hold onto a sharp gain over the last 30 days when it reported earnings. Though the stock fell about 1.8% during the first trading day following its report, the stock is up 9.8% over the last 30 days. The quarterly numbers and the outlook for the period ahead were both exceptional. But tucked into the same release was a capital return ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia reported fiscal Q1 2026 revenue of $81.6 billion, an 85% year-over-year increase and a 20% sequential climb, marking accelerated growth for the third consecutive quarter.
• The data center segment generated a record $75.2 billion in revenue, up 92% year-over-year, with networking revenue soaring 199% to $14.8 billion.
• Non-GAAP earnings per share rose 140% to $1.87, and adjusted gross margin expanded to 75%.
• Nvidia announced a 2,400% increase in its quarterly dividend to $0.25 per share and authorized an additional $80 billion in share repurchases, alongside generating $48.6 billion in free cash flow.
news.Keywords: Earnings Report, Revenue Growth, Data Center, Profitability, Capital Return

news.Title: 台股反攻挑戰42K！大漲逾500點 聯發科暴衝6％
news.Content: 美國、伊朗在巴基斯坦協調下，目前已接近達成和平協議，市場看好中東衝突可望解決，週四美股收盤創下歷史新高，台股今（22 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受惠於美伊接近達成和平協議及美股創歷史新高，台股今日開盤大漲逾500點，挑戰42K。
• 權值股方面，台積電開盤反彈20元至2250元，聯發科漲6%衝上3780元，台達電強拉80元至2110元。
• 記憶體股續強，南亞科漲逾3%，華邦電及旺宏亦漲逾3%，盤面呈現百花齊放的格局。
• 分析師指出，台股延續反彈走勢，美股科技股回穩帶動信心，權值股獲外資買盤推升。
• 昨日台股終場飆漲1347.39點，三大法人合計買超850.51億元，其中外資買超603.41億元。
news.Keywords: 地緣政治,科技股反彈,權值股,外資買盤,記憶體

news.Title: Rigetti Computing (RGTI) Soars 30% on $100M US Govt Backing
news.Content: Rigetti Computing Inc. (NASDAQ:RGTI) is one of the 10 Stocks With Shocking Overnight Gains. Rigetti Computing climbed by 30.57 percent on Thursday to close at $22.04 apiece, as investors snapped up shares after the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Rigetti Computing (RGTI) shares surged 30.57% following the announcement of US government backing for quantum computer development.
• The Department of Commerce will provide $2.013 billion in federal incentives under the CHIPS and Science Act for nine companies, including seven quantum computing firms and two foundries.
• Rigetti Computing will receive up to $100 million to develop next-generation superconducting quantum computing technologies.
• IBM and GlobalFoundries are also receiving significant funding, with IBM getting $1 billion and GlobalFoundries $375 million.
news.Keywords: Quantum Computing, Government Funding, CHIPS Act, Semiconductor, Technology Development

news.Title: Arm Holdings (ARM) Hits All-Time High as Profits Seen Rocketing 5x
news.Content: Arm Holdings PLC (NASDAQ:ARM) is one of the 10 Stocks With Shocking Overnight Gains. Arm Holdings notched a fresh all-time high anew on Thursday, as investors resumed buying positions after it earned an analyst’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Arm Holdings (ARM) reached an all-time high, driven by an optimistic outlook for fivefold profit growth by 2030.
• Bernstein initiated coverage with an 'outperform' rating and a $300 price target, citing potential for significant profit expansion.
• Arm is expected to increase its CPU market share fourfold in the next four years, reaching $137 billion, due to the shift to agentic AI.
• The company reported a 49% jump in Q4 FY2026 net income to $313 million, with revenues up 20% to $1.49 billion.
• Arm's Q1 FY2027 revenue outlook suggests a 19.6% increase year-over-year.
news.Keywords: CPU market share, profit growth, agentic AI, all-time high, semiconductor technology

news.Title: Why Salesforce Stock Slumped Today
news.Content: For the most part, stocks did well on a generally bullish Thursday for the market, but we can't say the same for Salesforce 's (NYSE: CRM) equity. The customer relationship management (CRM) specialist took a ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Salesforce (CRM) stock declined over 2% after an analyst lowered the fair value assessment from $200 to $185.
• The decline occurs amidst concerns about AI disruption potentially impacting legacy software solutions like Salesforce's CRM platform.
• Despite market sentiment, the article argues Salesforce is tech-forward, having launched its agentic AI solution, Agentforce.
• The company reported a 'beat-and-raise' third quarter and exceeded analyst estimates in the fourth quarter with double-digit growth.
• The author believes Salesforce is an underappreciated and competitive player in its segment, making the stock appear as a bargain.
news.Keywords: legacy software, AI disruption, CRM platform, analyst rating, stock valuation

news.Title: Why Nebius Stock Surged Today
news.Content: Shares of Nebius (NASDAQ: NBIS) spiked on Thursday after the data center operator formed a strategic partnership with Bloom Energy (NYSE: BE) . Will AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nebius (NBIS) stock surged following a strategic partnership with Bloom Energy (BE) to power AI factories.
• The collaboration aims to integrate Bloom's fuel cell technology into Nebius' AI data centers, addressing power bottlenecks in the AI boom.
• Bloom's fuel cells offer an efficient, low-pollution energy source suitable for AI workloads, generating electricity without combustion.
• Fuel cell systems may face fewer regulatory hurdles, enabling faster deployment compared to combustion-based systems.
• The first joint project, with 328 MW capacity, is expected to commence operations later this year.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, data center, fuel cell technology, strategic partnership, energy solutions

news.Title: Lam Research focused on adding AI to chipmaking tools as it eyes US expansion, CEO says
news.Content: By Stephen Nellis FREMONT, California, May 21 (Reuters) - Lam Research is focused on adding sensing and AI capabilities to its semiconductor manufacturing tools to make them more productive ‌as it plans expanded operations in Arizona and California, its chief executive told Reuters ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Lam Research is integrating AI and sensing capabilities into its chipmaking tools to enhance productivity.
• The company plans expanded operations in Arizona and California to support chipmakers like TSMC and Micron.
• Lam Research shares have risen over 75% this year due to high demand for AI chips driving tool purchases.
• AI systems will analyze data from sensors on the tools to identify inefficiencies and reduce chip defects.
• Lam is investing in startups like Lightfinder, which develops miniaturized chip measurement tools for integration into existing machinery.
news.Keywords: semiconductor manufacturing, AI integration, chipmaking tools, expansion plans, productivity enhancement

news.Title: Texas sues Meta, WhatsApp over encryption privacy claims
news.Content: NEW YORK, May 21 (Reuters) - The Texas Attorney General’s Office on Thursday sued WhatsApp and its parent company Meta ‌Platforms Inc alleging they misled consumers about the strength and ‌scope ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Texas is suing WhatsApp and its parent company Meta Platforms Inc. over alleged misrepresentations regarding encryption.
• The lawsuit claims WhatsApp and Meta misled consumers about the strength of encryption, despite having access to private communications.
• Meta denies the allegations, stating that WhatsApp cannot access users' encrypted communications.
• Texas is seeking a court order to prevent Meta and WhatsApp from accessing user messages without consent, along with monetary penalties.
• This lawsuit follows similar actions by Texas against other tech companies like Google and Netflix concerning data privacy.
news.Keywords: data privacy, encryption, consumer protection, regulatory action, messaging app

news.Title: Lessons from GenXers on Stock Bubbles and Manias
news.Content: (1:00) - What Can We Takeaway From The Past Stock Market Bubbles? (10:15) - Will AI Be The Next Dot-com Bubble? (21:45) - Breaking Down The Current Valuation of The AI Trade Right Now? (46:45) - Episode Roundup: MSFT, GOOGL, NVDA Podcast@zacks.com Welcome to Episode #486 of the Zacks Market Edge Podcast. Every week, host and Zacks stock strategist, Tracey Ryniec, will be joined by guests to discuss the hottest investing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The podcast discusses lessons from past stock market bubbles, particularly the dot-com era, in the context of the current AI boom.
• Key takeaways include managing FOMO, avoiding impulsive decisions like quitting jobs to daytrade, and recognizing signs of a bubble.
• Microsoft (MSFT) shares are down 13.3% year-to-date despite expected earnings growth of 27.1%, with a P/S ratio of 9.8.
• Alphabet (GOOGL) has hit all-time highs with a market cap of $4.7 trillion and expected earnings growth of 32.2%, but a P/S ratio of 11.2.
• NVIDIA (NVDA) is a leader in the AI boom with a market cap of $5.4 billion, showing strong earnings growth but a high P/S ratio of 21.4.
news.Keywords: stock bubbles, AI valuation, market mania, dot-com comparison, investment strategy

news.Title: Timucuan Asset Management Trims $5 Million From Thor Industries Position
news.Content: What happened An SEC filing dated May 14, 2026, shows Timucuan Asset Management sold 47,996 shares of Thor Industries (NYSE:THO) during the first quarter. The estimated transaction value is $4.89 million based on the average closing price from January through March. The quarter-end value of the position decreased by $63.05 million, reflecting both trading activity and price movements. ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Timucuan Asset Management sold 47,996 shares of Thor Industries (THO) in Q1, valued at approximately $4.89 million.
• The sale reduced Thor Industries' position to 7.5% of the fund's AUM, a decrease of $63.05 million from the previous quarter.
• Despite the trim, the fund still holds a significant stake, and the news is not considered a major sell-off by the firm.
• Thor Industries operates in the cyclical RV industry, with a 14% annualized total return since 1990 and a near-50% market share in the North American motorized RV niche.
news.Keywords: asset management, portfolio trimming, cyclical industry, RV market, shareholder value

news.Title: Apple asks US Supreme Court to review contempt order in Epic Games lawsuit
news.Content: By Mike Scarcella WASHINGTON, May 21 (Reuters) - Apple asked the U.S. Supreme Court on Thursday to review a lower court ruling that held the iPhone maker in ‌civil contempt over fees it was charging on some outside purchases made by ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Apple has petitioned the U.S. Supreme Court to review a lower court's civil contempt order related to App Store fees.
• The contempt order stems from Apple's handling of a lawsuit filed by Epic Games concerning transaction fees on outside purchases.
• Apple is challenging the injunction's applicability to non-class action plaintiffs and argues it cannot be held in contempt for violating the 'spirit' of the order.
• Epic Games views Apple's appeal as a delay tactic to avoid opening up payment competition and potential consumer benefits.
news.Keywords: litigation, regulatory scrutiny, antitrust, app store policy, Supreme Court appeal

news.Title: Main Street can now bet on OpenAl, SpaceX through Polymarket
news.Content: The biggest financial story of the last decade is not what is happening on Wall Street . It is what is happening just outside of it. The most valuable companies of this generation, the ones running cloud infrastructure, satellite internet, rocket launches and a sizable chunk of artificial intelligence research, have spent years deliberately staying private. They have raised tens of billions of dollars without ever filing an S-1. For most working Americans, that has been a closed loop. You can buy Tesla ( TSLA ) stock through your brokerage account today. You cannot buy SpaceX stock, no matter how ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Prediction market platform Polymarket has launched event contracts tied to the performance of private companies like OpenAI and SpaceX.
• This initiative, in partnership with Nasdaq Private Market, allows individuals to bet on milestones and valuations of these pre-IPO companies.
• The platform aims to provide access to the performance of high-value private companies, which have historically been inaccessible to most investors.
• Intercontinental Exchange (ICE), the parent company of the NYSE, has invested significantly in Polymarket, indicating strategic interest in this parallel market for sentiment.
news.Keywords: private markets, prediction markets, venture capital, alternative investments, market sentiment

news.Title: Amazon.com Shareholders Back Board as Jassy Touts AI, AWS Growth at Annual Meeting
news.Content: Key Points Interested in Amazon.com, Inc.? Here are five stocks we like better. Amazon shareholders approved the board’s director nominees , ratified Ernst & Young as auditor for fiscal 2026 and backed executive pay, while none of the shareholder proposals passed . CEO Andy Jassy emphasized Amazon’s AI and AWS momentum , saying AWS revenue grew 28% in Q1 2026 to a $150 billion run rate and that AWS AI revenue exceeded $15 billion on an annualized basis. CFO Brian Olsavsky said Amazon’s 2025 sales rose 12% to $716.9 billion , with AWS sales up 20% to $129 billion, but ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon.com shareholders approved the board's director nominees, auditor, and executive pay at the annual meeting.
• CEO Andy Jassy highlighted strong AI and AWS growth, with AWS revenue reaching a $150 billion run rate and AWS AI revenue exceeding $15 billion annualized.
• Full-year 2025 sales were $716.9 billion, up 12%, with AWS sales up 20% to $129 billion, though free cash flow declined due to increased AI infrastructure spending.
• Several shareholder proposals concerning data center risks, climate commitments, and AI advisory councils were rejected.
news.Keywords: shareholder meeting, AWS growth, AI infrastructure, capital expenditure, financial results

news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- The Trump administration has agreed to award $1 billion to International Business Machines Corp. to build a foundry for producing quantum computing chips, part of a broad strategy to bolster US leadership in an emerging industry. news.Title: The Path to 'Peak' Nvidia: Why the AI Giant's Future Will Inevitably Include Stiff Competition
news.Content: Wall Street has already grown thoroughly accustomed to the nearly non-stop expansion of Nvidia's (NVDA) market capitalization. The company has firmly established itself at the absolute summit of tech Olympus. Right now, current financial conditions for the business look ideal. Demand for artificial intelligence (AI) computing power exceeds supply by massive multiples, margins are breaking historical records, and financial flows seem completely inexhaustible. But my fundamental analysis requires a different approach. Investors shouldn't just look at the current point of peak triumph, but beyond the horizon. That's where the trends for the next three to five ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia (NVDA) currently enjoys peak market conditions with high demand for AI computing power, record margins, and strong financial flows.
• However, the long-term outlook suggests an environment of fierce competition, indicating the end of Nvidia's absolute dominance.
• Nvidia's competitive advantage, built on its CUDA software ecosystem, is being challenged by the rise of specialized ASICs developed by major clients like Microsoft (MSFT) and Meta Platforms (META) for cost optimization.
• Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is also posing a threat with its open-source ROCm software platform, aiming to capture market share in the GPU space.
news.Keywords: AI market, competitive landscape, software ecosystem, proprietary silicon, market share erosion

news.Title: Seagate stock price falls after CEO's rattling warning
news.Content: A throwaway line from a CEO rarely moves an entire sector in a single afternoon. Dave Mosley managed it on Monday. Speaking at the JPMorgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference, as reported by Benzinga , the Seagate Technology ( STX ) chief was asked a simple question: would the company build new factories to chase soaring AI storage demand? His answer rattled the room. New plants " would just take too long ," he said, and could leave Seagate with more capacity than it needs. That single comment dragged down the whole memory group, pulling Micron ( MU ), ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Seagate Technology (STX) stock fell significantly after its CEO warned about long lead times for recording head wafers (over nine months) and finished drives (an additional quarter).
• The CEO's comments suggested that Seagate cannot build new factories quickly enough to meet soaring AI storage demand, potentially leaving the company with excess capacity if demand shifts.
• The warning negatively impacted other memory stocks, including Micron (MU), Western Digital (WDC), and SanDisk (SNDK), which also experienced declines.
• Investors are debating whether Seagate's growth is supply-constrained or demand-constrained, with the former implying a ceiling on upside potential due to production limitations.
news.Keywords: storage demand, supply chain constraints, wafer lead times, AI infrastructure, memory market

news.Title: Stocks Fall on Doubts Over a US-Iran Peace Deal
news.Content: The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) today is down -0.44%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) is down -0.47%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) is down -0.49%. news.Title: Navitas vs onsemi: Which Stock Wins the AI Power Infrastructure Race?
news.Content: As artificial intelligence (AI) is reshaping data center infrastructure, power semiconductors have emerged as one of the market’s hottest battlegrounds. That has pushed shares of ON Semiconductor ON and Navitas Semiconductor NVTS sharply higher, with the latter soaring 222% year to date and the former gaining 103.5%. Both companies are riding the trend toward higher-voltage, energy-efficient AI power architectures. Their gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) chips help deliver faster switching speeds, lower heat and better power efficiency than traditional silicon solutions. But while onsemi is a profitable industry heavyweight (with a market cap of roughly $43 billion), Navitas ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Both ON Semiconductor (onsemi) and Navitas Semiconductor are benefiting from the AI power infrastructure race, with onsemi up 103.5% and Navitas up 222% year-to-date.
• Navitas is an emerging growth story, with its AI infrastructure business growing 50% sequentially in Q1 2026 and targeting a $1.4-$2.5 billion AI data center market by 2030.
• onsemi, a profitable industry heavyweight, saw its AI data center revenues jump over 30% sequentially in Q1 and expects them to double year-over-year in 2026.
• Navitas faces risks due to its small scale and unprofitability, while onsemi offers scale, profitability, and proven execution in high-growth markets like AI data centers.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, power semiconductors, gallium nitride, silicon carbide, market share

news.AI_Summary:
• 公司股東常會決議，許可特定董事從事與公司營業範圍相同或類似的投資或經營行為。
• 此競業行為許可期間為 2026年5月21日至2029年5月20日。
• 股東會以表決方式通過此項議案，出席股東表決權數中，贊成權數佔總權數一定比例。
• 此決議不涉及大陸地區事業營運，對公司財務業務影響程度為不適用。

news.Content: 記憶體廠南亞科 (2408-TW) 今 (21) 日召開股東會，董事長鄒明仁指出，受到人工智慧需求爆發帶動，全球記憶體產業已經由過去波動劇烈的傳統景氣循環模式，正式轉變為健康健 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南亞科預期AI需求帶動記憶體產業結構性增長，供不應求將延續至2027年底。
• 公司去年合併營收665.9億元，年增95%，稅後淨利26億元，EPS 2.13元，成功轉虧為盈。
• 股東會通過盈餘分配案，預計8月6日發放每股1.35元現金股利。
• 董事會決議調升2026年資本支出預算至超過520億元，用於先進製程與5A新廠擴建，預計2027年下半年量產。
news.Keywords: AI需求,記憶體供需,資本支出,營收成長,轉虧為盈

news.Title: 〈南亞科股東會〉資本支出衝破520億元 總座看供不應求將延續2027年底
news.Content: 記憶體廠南亞科 (2408-TW) 今 (21) 日召開股東會，董事長鄒明仁指出，受到人工智慧需求爆發帶動，全球記憶體產業已經由過去波動劇烈的傳統景氣循環模式，正式轉變為健康健 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 南亞科預期AI需求帶動記憶體產業結構性增長，供不應求將延續至2027年底。
• 公司去年合併營收665.9億元，年增95%，稅後淨利26億元，EPS 2.13元，成功轉虧為盈。
• 股東會通過盈餘分配案，預計8月6日發放每股1.35元現金股利。
• 董事會決議調升2026年資本支出預算至超過520億元，用於先進製程與5A新廠擴建，預計2027年下半年量產。

news.Title: 三星罷工矛盾台廠大利多？群聯這樣看 記憶體大老看法曝
news.Content: 三星（Samsung）近期爆發罷工衝突，市場關注是否進一步牽動DRAM與NAND Flash供需及價格走勢。群聯電子發言人呂國鼎今（21）日受訪表示，三星同時是群聯友好的客戶與供應商，因此不方便在此事件 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星罷工事件引發市場對DRAM與NAND Flash供需及價格走勢的關注。
• 群聯電子發言人表示，短期市場可能受心理因素影響，但實際供給影響仍需觀察罷工持續時間。
• 南亞科總經理認為，三星罷工事件影響應為短期效應，長期仍會回歸穩定；但DRAM產業結構性變化後已進入穩定階段，供給吃緊預期延續到明年底。
• 威剛董事長表示，三星罷工對全年產能影響有限，但已引發市場強烈預期心理，可能推升DRAM與NAND Flash價格。
• 群聯坦言原廠處於缺貨狀態，配貨邏輯將更重視附加價值，群聯透過自研技術爭取更多供貨支持。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,DRAM,NAND Flash,罷工,供需

news.Title: 《美股》油價/殖利率摔 輝達財報前CPU股/費半嗨
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-21 06:39:27 郭妍希 發佈

投資人期待中東衝突很快就能解決，帶動油價、美國公債殖利率雙雙下挫，也激勵美國四大指數全面強彈，科技與晶片類股在輝達(Nvidia Corp.)公布財報前全面跳漲 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受中東衝突緩解預期影響，油價及公債殖利率下跌，美股四大指數全面上漲，費城半導體指數大漲4.49%。
• 輝達(Nvidia)將公布財報，市場關注其毛利率及中國市場銷售布局，輝達股價盤前上漲1.3%。

news.Title: Cisco stock flashes rare technical signal
news.Content: Back in 2025, when Cisco Systems ( CSCO ) was trading around $66, key support, recommending it felt like a contrarian bet. The stock had spent years in the slow lane - a legacy networking name that the market had largely written off while flashier AI plays grabbed the headlines. Fast forward to now, and that bet has nearly doubled. As of Friday's close, according to TheStreet Pro , CSCO was up 98.6% from an entry point recommended by analyst Ed Ponsi in 2024. The stock is now trading far above every major moving average , AI orders are quadrupling, ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock has seen a nearly 99% increase from a recommended entry point in 2024, trading significantly above major moving averages.
• The company reported record quarterly revenue of $15.8 billion in Q3 fiscal 2026, up 12% year-over-year, with non-GAAP EPS at $1.06 (up 10% YoY).
• Total product orders surged 35% YoY, with AI infrastructure orders for the full fiscal year raised to $9 billion from $5 billion.
• A rare technical signal, a Relative Strength Index (RSI) close to 90 on May 19, indicates the stock is in extreme overbought territory, suggesting a potential short-term pause or pullback.
• Cisco provided Q4 fiscal 2026 guidance for revenue between $16.7-$16.9 billion and non-GAAP EPS of $1.16-$1.18, with full-year revenue guidance of $62.8-$63.0 billion.

news.Title: 三星大罷工點火記憶體族群！南亞科威剛股價走揚 分析師：短線題材
news.Content: 三星電子工會與資方調解破局，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，市場預估有望帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群今（20）日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星電子工會與資方調解破裂，確定自5月21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，預期可能帶動記憶體報價上漲。
• 受此消息影響，台記憶體族群今日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408）、威剛（3260）、創見（2451）等個股同步走揚。
• 分析師指出，三星罷工題材有助短線激勵記憶體股，但後續漲勢需觀察個股是否能突破盤整區間。
• 華邦電（2344）股價盤中震盪，跌幅收斂至約1.7%；南亞科則上漲約2%。
• 分析師建議，在盤整期間可考慮將資金暫時撤出，待趨勢重新翻多後再介入，並以華邦電為例，突破128元區間上緣才算確認新一輪多頭趨勢。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,罷工,供需預期,股價走勢,技術分析

news.Content: 三星電子工會與資方調解破局，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工，市場預估有望帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群今（20）日止跌回穩，南亞科（2408 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 三星電子工會因調解破裂，確定自21日起展開為期18天的大罷工。
• 市場預期罷工可能帶動記憶體報價上漲，激勵台記憶體族群如南亞科、威剛、創見等今日止跌回穩並走揚。
• 分析師指出，三星罷工題材對短線記憶體股有激勵效果，但後續漲勢需觀察個股是否能突破盤整區間。
• 儘管基本面預期缺貨持續至2027年，但近期股價修正主因在於上漲後籌碼混亂，建議待趨勢翻多後再介入。

news.Title: 記憶體血流成河 誰被錯殺？專家拆解「3大鬼故事」：你相信黃仁勳還是三星高層
news.Content: 台股記憶體族群今（19）日驚現全面性重挫，包括南亞科、華邦電、旺宏、鈺創、群聯、愛普等六檔個股全數慘殺至跌停。面對大陸廠大幅擴產、三星罷工轉單落空，以及群聯發行海外可轉債（ECB）等市場傳聞夾擊，專家直言這些利空皆為短線的「鬼故事 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股記憶體族群今日全面重挫，南亞科、華邦電等六檔個股跌停。
• 專家認為大陸廠擴產、三星罷工轉單落空、群聯發行ECB等傳聞為短線「鬼故事」，基本面並未轉壞。
• 分析師指出，南亞科與華邦電產能已接近滿載，轉單效應僅為加分項，即使無轉單基本面仍強勁。
• 群聯發行ECB被解讀為「短空長多」，有利於公司未來籌措資金及股價表現。
• 記憶體族群具備低本益比、高殖利率特性，在利率走高時具吸引力，建議尋找被誤殺的價值股進行操作。
news.Keywords: 記憶體,跌停,基本面,轉單效應,可轉債

news.Title: How Big Could the AI Data Center Opportunity Be for Navitas?
news.Content: The artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure is set to become a major long-term growth catalyst for Navitas Semiconductor NVTS as hyperscalers are increasing power requirements inside next-generation data centers. This shift is creating a large and fast-growing opportunity for the company’s gallium nitride (GaN) and silicon carbide (SiC) power semiconductor portfolio. The company estimates the AI ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) is positioned to benefit from the AI infrastructure boom, with the AI data center market estimated to be a $1.4-$2.5 billion SAM opportunity by 2030.
• The company projects GaN and SiC adoption in AI data centers to grow at a 66-87% CAGR between 2025 and 2030, driven by efficiency and power density demands.
• Navitas estimates potential GaN and SiC semiconductor content of $25,000-$35,000 per megawatt in future AI infrastructure deployments.
• AI infrastructure revenues for Navitas grew 50% sequentially in Q1 2026, exceeding expectations, and the company believes its dual GaN/SiC offering provides a strategic advantage.
news.Keywords: AI data centers, power semiconductors, GaN, SiC, market opportunity

news.Title: ON Semiconductor Stock Soars 60% in 3 Months: Still a Smart Bet?
news.Content: ON Semiconductor Corporation ON has been one of the semiconductor sector’s strongest performers lately, with the stock surging 60.1% over the past three months, compared with the industry’s rise of 29.2%. The rally has been fueled by a combination of improving cyclical demand, accelerating artificial intelligence data-center opportunities and rising confidence that the company has moved beyond the worst phase of the semiconductor downturn. Investors were especially encouraged by ON Semiconductor’s first-quarter 2026 results, where both revenues and earnings exceeded expectations while management projected stronger growth ahead. A major driver behind the stock’s sharp ...
news.AI_Summary:
• ON Semiconductor (ON) stock has surged 60.1% in three months, outperforming the semiconductor sector, driven by improving cyclical demand and AI data center opportunities.
• First-quarter 2026 results exceeded expectations, with AI data center revenues up over 30% sequentially and projected to double year-over-year in 2026.
• The company is a key beneficiary of AI infrastructure growth, supplying power-management chips for AI servers and hyperscale data centers.
• Automotive semiconductor revenues reached $797 million in Q1 2026, returning to growth, with significant traction in EVs, especially in China, and adoption of its Treo platform for next-gen vehicle architectures.
• Gross margin expanded to 38.5% in Q1 2026, with expectations for further improvement due to rising utilization and higher-margin product mix.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, automotive semiconductors, power management, cyclical recovery, margin expansion

韓股今(18)日走勢分歧。韓國KOSPI指數終場收在7516.0 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 韓國KOSPI指數終場上漲0.31%，收在7516.04點，盤中一度因國際油價飆升與公債利率走高出現恐慌性拋售。
• 政府對三星勞資分歧表態後，風險預期改變，帶動指數回升。
• Samsung Electronics與SK Hynix在盤中急跌後出現回補買盤，分別上漲3.88%及1.15%。
• 法院對Samsung Electronics勞資爭議相關禁制令以及政府介入協調，降低了對生產中斷的擔憂。
• Hyundai Motor、HD Hyundai Heavy Industries、LG Energy Solution等非半導體權值股承壓下跌。
news.Keywords: 韓國股市, KOSPI指數, 半導體股, 勞資爭議, 權值股

news.Title: 《日股》日經收跌近1%、連三跌
news.Content:

日股 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 日股今日走弱，日經225指數收跌0.97%，連續三日下跌。
• 東證股價指數(TOPIX)亦下跌0.97%。
• 賣壓主要來自原油價格走高、日美長期利率上升及地緣政治風險，導致買盤動能轉弱。
• AI與半導體相關權值股遭獲利了結，愛德萬測試、東京威力科創走弱。
• 汽車類股、輸送用機器、紡織製品等類股多數走弱。

news.Title: 【公告】係因晶豪科有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，故公布相關財務業務等重大訊息，以利投資人區別瞭解。
news.Content:
日 期：2026年05月18日

公司名稱：晶豪科 (3006)

主 旨：係因晶豪科有價證券於集中交易市場達公布注意交易資訊標準，故公布相關財務業務等重大 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 晶豪科（3006）因有價證券交易異常，接獲證券交易所通知，公布相關財務業務重大訊息。
• 公司4月合併自結營業收入為46.34億元，較去年同期增加349%。
• 4月稅前淨利為23.62億元，較去年同期增加1707%；歸屬母公司業主淨利為18.48億元，較去年同期增加1429%。
• 4月每股純益為6.32元，較去年同期增加1364%。
• 公司提供近一月、最近一季及最近四季累計的財務資訊，以供投資人參考。
news.Keywords: 重大訊息公告, 交易異常, 財務業務資訊, 營收成長, 獲利成長

news.Title: 【國票金控晨訊】台股估盤下開出 盤中留意權值股
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※操作建議與結論

通膨憂慮再起，美股全數收跌 台股高檔震盪加劇，留意記 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 受通膨憂慮及美債殖利率上升影響，美股全數收跌，台積電ADR下跌3.2%，台指期夜盤下跌487點，預估台股今日盤下開出。
• 市場關注記憶體族群的布局機會，因記憶體報價持續在高檔，且龍頭廠三星電子可能罷工，加劇供應緊張。
• 美中關係未明顯降溫，加上荷姆茲海峽仍未順利通航，高油價持續引發市場對通膨的擔憂。
• 操作上建議避免追高，並留意記憶體族群的布局時機。
• 重點推薦產業與族群包括記憶體相關的南亞科、宜鼎、群聯，以及新增標的昇陽半導體。
news.Keywords: 台股預期, 記憶體族群, 通膨擔憂, 三星罷工風險, 盤勢分析

news.Title: 【統一證券晨訊】多頭架構鬆動　台股震盪回測支撐
news.Content:
日期：2026年 5月18日

※盤勢分析

美、日公債殖利率飆升，避險情緒攀升，台股震盪回測支撐

※昨日盤勢

路透社傳美國擬批准輝達向中國出口H200晶片的消息，市場情緒瞬間被點燃

，台股順勢以41830點紅盤開出，早盤最高甚至衝上 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 台股昨日（5月15日）因美國公債殖利率飆升及地緣政治擔憂，指數大跌579點，收於41172點，成交量1.31兆元。
• 權值股表現疲弱，台積電下跌0.22%，聯發科下跌4.25%，廣達下跌8.52%，顯示多頭架構鬆動。
• 台積電宣布計劃出售不超過1.52億股世界先進（5347）持股，約佔8.1%，預計採鉅額交易方式出售予財務投資機構。
• 技術面上，台股周K線留下長上影線，KD與RSI轉弱，MACD柱狀體由紅翻黑，預示短期回檔整理未結束，建議多看少做。
• 市場關注輝達財報及Computex展，但全球通膨隱憂、油價走揚及美日公債殖利率飆升，建議降低槓桿及持股成數。
news.Keywords: 台股,技術面,籌碼面,財報,通膨

news.Title: 《美股》川習會沒突破+憂通膨 輝達/費半臉綠
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-18 06:19:54 郭妍希 發佈

受到油價跳高引發全球通膨疑慮、公債殖利率跳升衝擊，美國四大指數15日全面拉回。

道瓊工業平均指數5月15日終場下跌1.07%(537.29點)、收49,526.17點；週 ...
news.AI_Summary:
• 美國股市週五（5月15日）全面拉回，道瓊工業指數下跌1.07%，那斯達克指數下跌1.54%，標準普爾500指數下跌1.24%，費城半導體指數重挫4.02%。
• 油價跳高引發通膨疑慮，美國10年期公債殖利率觸及2025年5月以來新高，市場預期聯準會12月升息機率升至40%。
• 川習會未有實質突破，中國未明確協助解決美伊衝突，市場失望；輝達因出口管制疑慮下跌4.42%，台積電ADR及AMD ADR同步下滑。
• 安謀(Arm Holdings PLC)因面臨美國聯邦貿易委員會(FTC)反壟斷調查，股價重挫8.46%，跌幅居費半成分股之冠。
• 儘管面臨賣壓，標普500指數仍連續七週上漲，創2023年12月以來新高；微軟因艾克曼旗下基金揭露持股而逆勢勁揚3.05%。
news.Keywords: 美股,通膨,公債殖利率,地緣政治,半導體

news.Title: Jim Cramer on Silicon Motion: “You Buy Some, and Then You Wait for a Pullback”
news.Content: Silicon Motion Technology Corporation (NASDAQ: SIMO ) was among Jim Cramer’s Mad Money stock calls as he urged investors to exercise caution when it comes to red-hot AI stocks . When a caller asked about the stock, Cramer stated: That is called SIMO… And we like SIMO. I know it’s ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Jim Cramer recommends buying Silicon Motion (SIMO) but suggests waiting for a pullback due to its recent significant price appreciation.
• Silicon Motion develops and markets NAND flash controllers and specialized storage solutions for computing, enterprise data centers, and mobile devices.
• The company has transitioned towards higher-margin, leading-edge applications driven by hyperscaler demands, moving away from lower-margin consumer electronics.
• Heartland Advisors believes SIMO remains undervalued, with a price target of $185 compared to its current trading price of $117, factoring in an anticipated $160 million cash settlement from an arbitration case.
news.Keywords: stock recommendation, NAND flash controllers, data center storage, hyperscaler demand, undervaluation
